summary: Like Claude design for email marketing Discussion | Link
content: Brew is the fastest way to design and send beautiful, on-brand emails and automations that render perfectly in every inbox. Describe a campaign or a multi-step automation in plain English, and Brew builds the whole thing in seconds: copy, design, audience, and logic. Works with any AI agent: paste our docs into OpenClaw, Viktor, Claude, or Lovable. No lock-in: send from Brew or export to your ESP. Free to get started.
chineseSummary: 喜欢克劳德的电子邮件营销设计讨论|关联
chineseContent: Brew 是设计和发送精美的品牌电子邮件和自动化的最快方式，可在每个收件箱中完美呈现。用简单的英语描述一个活动或多步骤自动化，Brew 在几秒钟内构建整个事情：文案、设计、受众和逻辑。可与任何 AI 代理配合使用：将我们的文档粘贴到 OpenClaw、Viktor、Claude 或 Lovable 中。无锁定：从 Brew 发送或导出到您的 ESP。免费开始。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
